news.t: Victory Portfolios II To Transfer Listing of Six ETFs to Nasdaq

holdings.infoBox: UIVM is an equity ETF with a total of 198 individual holdings. The top holdings are The Toronto-Dominion Bank stock at 1.22%, The Bank of Nova Scotia at 1.15%, Oversea-Chinese Banking Corporation at 1.07%, Poste Italiane at 1.07%, and Samsung Electro-Mechanics at 1.07%.

overview.description: The VictoryShares International Value Momentum ETF (UIVM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks a multi-factor-selected, volatility-weighted index of stocks from developed economies outside of the United States. UIVM was launched on Oct 24, 2017 and is issued by VictoryShares.
infoTable: Nasdaq Victory International Value Momentum Index

data.title: Victory Portfolios II To Transfer Listing of Six ETFs to Nasdaq
data.text: SAN ANTONIO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Victory Portfolios II today announced plans to transfer the listing of six ETFs from NYSE to Nasdaq on or around November 1, 2022.
